evals.prompt: Plan an Isaac Lab install linked to an existing Isaac Sim. Do not install.
evals.expected_output: Provides a safe install plan that selects full Isaac Sim-backed mode, discovers existing installs, avoids shell startup mutation, and verifies with isaaclab.sh.
assertions: Chooses full Isaac Sim-backed mode for performance benchmarking unless told otherwise
Approval-gates dependency installs and env removal

evals.prompt: I only need Isaac Lab 3.0 Newton workflows without Isaac Sim. What install path should I use?
evals.expected_output: Routes to the kit-less/Newton mode and states what Isaac Sim-backed features are not available.
assertions: Identifies kit-less/Newton as appropriate only for workflows not needing Isaac Sim features
Warns not to use kit-less mode for PhysX/ROS/importers/Omniverse visualization
